Dark Here.

Feelings of Guilt, Shame, Helplessness, and Anger. 







Proven:

I stood staring down at Amy my wife of 27 years, her lifeless body crumpled in a heap at the bottom of the stairs. So many emotions rushing through my head, panic, fear, anger. But most of all, I felt tremendous guilt. I wondered, could I have stopped this? I knew she got out of breath and dizzy when climbing the stairs. And although at first glance, this seemed like a terrible accident, deep down inside of me I questioned whether it might have been something else, something very troubling. After all, Amy had been very low recently and I'd become increasingly concerned that her dark moods were affecting her life more than she led on. She had always been so bubbly, it was one of the reasons I fell in love with her in the first place, her positive outlook on life. But over time, she had turned into a different woman, ground down more and more with every weight loss failure. And I hadn't been able to help her.







LeptoConnect



"Daddy, am I going to get big like mommy?" After hearing these words coming out of the mouth of our frightened 11 year old daughter, my wife collapsed on the couch with tears crawling down her face. After all she'd done, she exercised every single morning, jogging, crunches, squats, until she felt nauseous. She ate healthy, oats, spinach, steamed chicken, green salad, and nothing after 6:00 PM. She did keto, paleo, Atkins, intermittent fasting. She gave up carbs and fat and salt and sugar and even food altogether. She drank gallons of lemon water.



Exhausted, sore, and always starving, she got on that scale, barely daring to look at it, but the numbers were the same. The numbers never went down. She felt heartbroken and worthless. Buried inside her body, her life ruled by her belly fat. Then a horrifying realization hit her. She might have to live like this forever, overweight for the rest of her life, always prone to people staring and judging her. So when my wife looked up at me and said, "I wish I could just disappear forever." She tore my soul apart, leaving me helpless and angry that the kind woman I love so much had to suffer through so many restrictions, exercises and medical visits, all for nothing. It was the most heart wrenching moment in our marriage.

Hello and welcome. My name is John Barban and the most ironic part of my seriously bizarre story is that just prior to being blindsided by rapid onset weight gain after I turned 40 and the life threatening health conditions that resulted from it, I was actually recognized as the world's leading expert in metabolism and weight loss.

So yeah, talk about a painfully embarrassing fall from grace. I held a long list of prestigious degrees in the fields of nutrition, physiology and biology, and I taught human performance at the acclaimed University of Florida for years.

The world's largest health companies were paying me silly amounts to train their staff and formulate their award-winning supplements. As a matter of fact, if you've taken any effective supplement by any of the world's biggest brands in the last 10 years, you've seen my work.

Yet most fulfilling to me was being able to help transform millions of women and men around the world through my international bestselling diet and exercise programs, which implemented the most cutting edge fat loss strategies available at the time.





Things Used to be Normal and then At Some Point They Turned (Pregnancy or Age Related)





Proven

It all started over 30 years ago, we were high school sweethearts and both skinny as a rake. Like most young people, we took our health for granted enjoying life and everything that came with it. Sure, we were young, but we knew we wanted to spend the rest of our lives together. So at just 22, we decided to marry. And shortly after, Amy fell pregnant. Life was perfect. During her pregnancy, she put on around 40 pounds, which never went away. Then she fell pregnant with our second, Melissa, and on went another 20 pounds. After our third child, she was 90 pounds heavier. She had become obese with a BMI of over 36. I saw Amy's demeanor change a lot over the years. She had become introverted and unhappy, a husk of the woman I loved. One day I walked in on her naked checking her reflection in the bathroom mirror, she immediately grabbed a towel and covered up. I could see the tears welling. I could almost feel her shame and guilt for letting herself get like this

Meets Wise Sensei





Proven

I didn't know where to turn. Sadly, I was close to giving up. Every night I prayed hard to God for help. Then one miraculous day, I'm sure he heard my prayers. It was early last year, March the 15th, to be exact. I remember it like it was yesterday because it was one of those rare times Amy had agreed to go out in public. We traveled upstate to her sister's wedding, and it was there that I met a man who totally changed our lives forever. I'm going to call him Chen. I can't tell you his real name for reasons that will become clear in a minute. Amy's sister was marrying a Chinese-American guy and Chen was a cousin of his who had come over from Beijing for the wedding. He was sitting next to me at the table, a super nice guy, and his English was perfect.



We hit it off immediately and ended up talking for ages. He told me about life in China, his love of baseball, my favorite sport and what he did for work. He is a leading research scientist for the Chinese government's health department. And the more we talked and drank, the more we both opened up. Before I knew it, most of the other guests had left. Amy was so tired she could barely stay awake, so she made her excuses and left. "She gets tired easily," I told Chen. And I talked about her health and what the doctors had said. She's tried everything to keep the weight off, but nothing seems to work. My eyes filled with tears and then I broke down, "I'm so scared I'm going to lose her, I'm not sure if I could go on."



Chen's space totally serious. He seemed hesitant at first, but he could see I was in so much pain and that I'd pretty much given up all hope. He took a deep breath and told me something that chilled me to the bone, a shocking secret that he'd been forced to keep quiet about for years. You see, China has always been a nation of thin and healthy people, "We took pride in this fact," he told me. And the government had enlisted our department to find the cause of the obesity epidemic that had suddenly exploded over the past decade. Something had drastically changed, people were getting more and more overweight and even obesity rates in children had spiraled out of control. We spent years pouring through thousands and thousands of published scientific studies from throughout the world trying to find some kind of link. And what we eventually discovered was truly shocking.

Testing it With Others





Proven

God had blessed us by revealing the most amazing health formula ever. I wanted to share it with the world, but first I wanted to make sure that Amy success wasn't just a one off, that it would work for others in the same way, people who were suffering most with uncontrolled hunger and weight gain. They had to be over 40, very overweight and unable to keep the weight off no matter their diet or how much they exercised. In just five days, we had 62 people all suffering from varying levels of obesity who were willing to try it out. And after 90 days, the results were more incredible than any of us could have ever imagined. The average weight loss in the group was 55 pounds.

Adrian Thomas:

And several of them could even see their abs for the first time ever. The formula had actually worked on everyone regardless of how much they had to lose, their metabolism, their genetics, and their previous failed attempts to trying to lose weight. Glancing over Ingredients





Proven

The minute I arrived, I went straight to the lab and began trying to reverse engineer the contents. And I was very surprised at what I discovered. The first ingredient was Asian green tea leaf. Green tea is actually great at reducing oxidative stress and has been shown in several laboratory studies to help reduce damage caused by chemicals such as BPA. It has also been shown to stimulate glucuronidation, a detoxification pathway used for eliminating toxins from the body. The next ingredient was something called Asian ginseng, also known as Panax ginseng. According to scientific research, it enhances mood, supports immunity, and delays the appearance of aging. But more importantly, research shows that it also detoxifies the body quickly from foreign pollutants.

Adrian Thomas:

Next up I identified olive leaves, an agonist to the TGR5 receptor. This means it can boost your metabolism by supporting thyroid function and your body's hormone levels. And in addition, I found several other important active compounds, including quercetin, a well known super antioxidant that can help protect cells from damage by the free radicals that are slowing down your metabolism and causing premature signs of aging. Turmeric, shown to reverse many of the harmful effects of chemical exposure and dramatically decreasing oxidative stress throughout the body. And various types of Asian mushrooms, including shiitake, reishi, and maitake, all of which are chocked full of hypolipidemic fat reducing properties. It also contained grape seed, which detoxifies your body of cadmium, a harmful obesogen that can be found in foods like cereals, nuts and vegetables.

Adrian Thomas:

"I couldn't believe what I was seeing," explained Chen," here were all natural ingredients that when combined managed to seemingly counteract the harmful effects of toxic obesogens. And these monks that made it for generations probably didn't even know what an obesogen was. It seemed to support healthy hormone levels, reduce fat storage, and stop the uncontrollable cravings whilst at the same time helping to support a healthy heart, brain, and joints. That would explain why the villagers who even though they lived in a toxic environment managed to love longer, seem younger, and were of a healthier weight."







LeptoConnect

Now, as Allen was about to discover, it's because starting with their ancestors, they're used to consuming three sacred medicinal mushrooms used for centuries as food for the brain and body.

Sam Hansen:

Now, first, there's maitake, known as the king of mushrooms, once hunted and consumed by the Japanese samurai who used to dance when they'd finally find it. Now, this wonder mushroom is so strong, it is used against brain tumors. Now, maitake contains a magic active element known as D-fraction, which lowers blood pressure, regulates blood sugar levels, and causes your body to burn instead of storing fat. Sam Hansen:

Now, last but not least, reishi, called the supreme protector, can reduce fat deposited beneath the skin by up to 59%. Now, thanks to its ability to regenerate brain cells and nerves, the mushroom has beneficial effects on brain receptors and mental health, reducing dizziness, fatigue, and stress and improving memory.

Sam Hansen:

After taking a small bowl of the fresh mixture made from these potent mushrooms, Allen remembered waking up four pounds lighter the very next morning. He limited himself to a small spoon for two more weeks until he arrived in South America, where he got the chance to test something else. Graviola leaves, or the Brazilian paw paw, comes from a small evergreen tree and are rich in antioxidants, which have the unique power to regenerate brain receptors and purify body cells by hunting the disease-causing free radicals and destroying them. You can think about it as a complete detoxifier that regulates glucose levels as well.

Sam Hansen:

Allen's last stop was in Central Africa where he experimented one more time with Pygeum africanum or the African cherry. Now, this small fruit contains special phytosterols, nutrients that feed brain receptors, improve intercellular communication, and strengthen the leptin satiety signals. As an added bonus, Pygeum africanum is believed to increase libido.

Sam Hansen:

On his trip, Allen also discovered three more enhancers that when combined with the fat blasting mushrooms, increase their effectiveness, red raspberries that cause your body to break down the fat within cells more easily, cat's claw can eliminate dangerous bacteria and restore a healthy micro environment in your gut. So your digestion is perfect. Now, saw palmetto, that prevents future damage to brain cell receptors, thanks to its unique group of antioxidants. After every spoon of powder, my friend felt better and lighter, but what if he mixed them? All of them? He was afraid at first because those are some powerful God-like herbs, but people do all sorts of things out of desperation. The result, he lost weight. A lot. Now, the downside, he was afraid of getting too skinny.

Sam Hansen:

Now, as soon as I got home from our dinner, I checked out every mushroom, herb, or fruit. Every one of them was linked to countless studies and benefits. All in all, Allen's recipe included nine wonder ingredients clinically proven to address the root cause of leptin resistance by turbo boosting and multiplying brain receptors and stopping food cravings.







Resurge



I recognized quite a few scientifically proven nutrients on the list from various formulations I worked on over the years, but never imagined the impact they could have on deep sleep when taken all at the same time.

Some of them included…

10 milligrams of the purest grade, naturally sourced Melatonin available, which has proven to help you get to sleep faster and increase the duration of your deep sleep.

150 milligrams of a rare East Indian Ashwagandha plant, which has proven to decrease stress, cortisol and anxiety while promoting a relaxed state conducive for increasing quality deep sleep.

100 milligrams of the natural amino acid Hydroxytryptophan, a specific form of which has proven to enhance the effects of Melatonin and to improve the quality and duration of deep sleep.

200 milligrams L-Theanine, a powerful phytonutrient that has been used by the Japanese for centuries. And it's proven to put you in a relaxed state, reduce anxiety and resting heart rate and produce longer, more restful sleep while significantly increasing the overall duration of deep sleep.

50 milligrams of magnesium along with 15 milligrams of zinc, which when taken together with the other nutrients is proven to significantly improve quality of deep sleep, ease of getting to sleep and morning alertness upon waking.

And lastly, the two breakthrough nutrients that super-charge everything.

1200 milligrams of Arginine and 1200 milligrams of Lysine, two natural amino acids that when combined is proven to increase the amount of age defying human growth hormone that is released during deep sleep up to 695%.

In the end, it was a completely unique list of a hundred percent natural ingredients that work perfectly together to significantly enhance our deep sleep and the metabolic regeneration we experience when in it, and in turn immediately start to reverse all of the terrible problems I've been experiencing from shallow sleep syndrome.
